_comment: Maps a project's stack (CLAUDE.md §5) to the specialist skills that help build it. Run `bash scripts/bootstrap.sh <stack-key…>` to install the ones this project needs. Leaf keys (.net, ios-swiftui, flutter, web) are what you pass to bootstrap. kind=skills-cli → `npx skills add <ref>`; kind=plugin → `claude plugin marketplace add <marketplace>` then `claude plugin install <plugin>@<marketplaceName>`; kind=todo → no confirmed public source yet, fill it in before it can be installed.

ios-swiftui.name: swiftui-pro
ios-swiftui.source: TODO — personal skill, no confirmed public upstream

flutter.name: flutter-dart-code-review
flutter.source: TODO — personal skill, no confirmed public upstream
